title: The Doctor's Dilemma
writer: George Bernard Shaw, Anatole de Grunwald
actors: Leslie Caron, Dirk Bogarde, Alastair Sim
plot: A single doctor about to be awarded a knighthood for his claim of curing tuberculosis is infatuated by a woman's beauty and charm, promising to save her husband's life, only to change his mind after discovering the man's immoral c...
